articles.title: How a Small Spanish Town Became the Pickleball Capital of the World
articles.description: Rota, Spain, is set to host the Reballution Cup 2026, the largest outdoor pickleball tournament in Europe. With over 720 competitors registered, this year's event has attracted participants from around 30 countries, showcasing the sport's global appeal.

The former England captain also praised Sooryavanshi's growing global popularity, while Stuart Broad claimed the teenager has become an international star even before making his debut for India.

articles.title: Quote of the day for kids by Wayne Gretzky: "You miss 100% of the shots you don't..."
articles.description: Wayne Gretzky, the legendary hockey player, famously said, "You miss 100% of the shots you don't take." This powerful message encourages everyone, especially children, to embrace opportunities and try new activities. Fear of failure should not hold anyone back. Effort leads to growth and confidence. Taking action is key to discovering potential and achieving goals.
